provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Lotteries and Betting Act.

provisions.title: Interpretation
Lotteries deemed lawful
provisions.content:
3. Lotteries deemed lawful
(1) A lottery shall be deemed to be lawful if it is promoted on behalf of—
( a ) a society; or
( b ) an institution or organisation prescribed as a charitable institution,
and is promoted and conducted in accordance with the provisions of section 4.
(2) Regulations may prescribe such institutions or organisations which are considered to be charitable institutions or organisations for the purposes of this Act.

provisions.title: Conditions to be observed in promotion of and conduct of lottery

definitions.definition: any foot-race, horse race, dog-race, cycle race, motor-race or boat-race and any other race declared under section 25 to be a race
any club or association of persons promoting and controlling racing
the place at which a race is or is to be held
assigned to it in the Societies Act (Cap. 18:01)
any society registered or exempted under the Societies Act
the contrivance for betting known as the totalizator or any other machine or instrument of betting of a like nature, whether mechanically operated or not.
